flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Georgetown College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (51.8% → 43.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Georgetown College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (56.4% → 48.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Georgetown College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 1.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Georgetown College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).
